name: agent-powerups
description: Reusable AI agent skills, commands, hooks, and workflows for Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini — an Oh My Zsh-style collection of developer powerups.

plugins.name: dev-vitals
plugins.description: Core developer workflow skills: planning, execution, communication, and powerup discovery.

plugins.name: debugging-diagnostics
plugins.description: Error diagnosis, fault isolation, log forensics, and incident investigation.

plugins.name: codebase-maintenance
plugins.description: Safe refactoring, dead-code removal, legacy modernization, and dependency hygiene.

plugins.name: data-engineering
plugins.description: Analytics engineering, dbt patterns, BigQuery optimization, data quality, and pipeline workflows.

plugins.name: documentation-systems
plugins.description: Documentation architecture, API reference authoring, ADR writing, readme hardening, and doc quality.

plugins.name: machine-learning-ops
plugins.description: ML pipeline design, experiment tracking, model evaluation, training debugging, and reproducibility.

plugins.name: quality-gates
plugins.description: Quality enforcement: TDD discipline, code review workflows, release verification, and CI failure analysis.

plugins.name: software-engineering
plugins.description: Full-lifecycle software delivery: parallel execution, requirements clarification, autonomous pipeline, persistent completion loops, and hard-won skill extraction.

plugins.name: agentic-systems
plugins.description: Multi-model orchestration and advisor routing: tri-model review and canonical advisor routing.

plugins.name: security-guardrails
plugins.description: Security vulnerability detection: OWASP Top 10 analysis, secrets scanning, dependency audits.

plugins.name: codebase-intelligence
plugins.description: Codebase mapping and analysis: parallel mapper agents producing structured codebase documents (STACK, ARCHITECTURE, CONVENTIONS, CONCERNS, etc.).

plugins.name: spec-driven-development
plugins.description: Spec-driven project lifecycle: new-project initialization, discuss/plan/execute/verify phase pipeline with research and goal-backward planning.

plugins.name: spec-quality-gates
plugins.description: Spec-driven quality gates: plan verification before execution, adversarial code review with severity classification, and goal-backward plan checking.

plugins.name: context-efficiency
plugins.description: Context-efficient routing: lightweight dispatch commands that route user intent to the right workflow, review, or codebase-intelligence skill without loading full context.

plugins.name: agent-evaluation-lab
plugins.description: Prompt, skill, red-team, and agent behavior evaluation workflows.

plugins.name: tool-integrations
plugins.description: Browser, MCP, retrieval, and agent runtime integration skills with conservative safety boundaries.
